prerequisites.value: Base attack bonus +6 or monk level 6th.

description.value:
**Benefit:** Whenever you make a successful charge attack while wielding a two-handed weapon in both hands, add two times your Strength bonus to the damage roll.

**Normal:** A character wielding a two-handed weapon adds 1-1/2 times her Strength bonus to damage rolls.

**Special:** A monk can use this feat as long as he is wielding a two-handed weapon or both his hands are empty. Note: A monk can take any of these feats as bonus feats at the indicated levels. To benefit from the feats, monks must have both hands free and capable of delivering an unarmed strike.
